name: handoff
description: Skill-only session continuity with Markdown handoffs

interface.shortDescription: Save, load, and search Markdown handoffs; maintain a derived project throughline
interface.longDescription: Save Markdown handoffs for session continuity, load handoffs as read-only resume context, and search project handoffs with plain text search. Maintain THROUGHLINE.md, a rolling derived condensation of the project's handoff history.
defaultPrompt: Save a handoff for this session
